3233490.name: Kingdom Of Cubes
3233490.description:
Kingdom Of Cubes - a terrible event happened in a small kingdom surrounded by an endless sea. A cunning goblin stole a valuable scroll from a young girl named Alice. A scroll containing ancient knowledge about protecting the kingdom from powerful magic has fallen into the clutches of an insidious villain.

You are a brave adventurer, ready to rush to the rescue! Your task is to go on a dangerous journey through a kingdom of islands and find the goblin!

Solve puzzles, complete various tasks, beware of traps and be careful not to fall into the water! Travel through a vibrant and diverse world full of amazing characters and creatures! Go in search of the goblin and return the scroll to Alice!
